title: App Settings- General - Account - Invite to second tenant, UI
scenario: Inviting a user to a second Lens tenant via App Settings > General > Account shows both invites; accepting one removes it while the other remains, and declining the remaining invite does not change tenant info in Support > App
steps: Navigate to App Settings → General → Account
Receive two invites for different Lens accounts
Log in to the app and observe both invites displayed in the Account section
Log out of the app and verify both invites disappear from the Account section
Log back into the app and verify both invites reappear in the Account section
Accept one of the two invites
Verify the accepted invite disappears from the Account section
Verify the other (unaccepted) invite remains visible in the Account section
Navigate to Support → App and verify the tenant info reflects the accepted Lens account
Return to App Settings → General → Account
Navigate to Support → App and verify the tenant info remains unchanged (still reflects the previously accepted Lens account)
expected: The user can successfully manage multiple Lens tenant invites: invites appear when logged in, disappear when logged out, reappear on re-login. Accepting one invite removes it while keeping the other visible, and the tenant info in Support → App updates to the accepted tenant. Declining the remaining invite removes it from the Account section, and the tenant info in Support → App remains unchanged (still showing the previously accepted tenant).
